p.c: not forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x0, k0, x1) } } or continuous_at(f, x0)
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or not continuous_condition(f, x0, x1, k0) } } or continuous_at(f, x0)

let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or not continuous_condition(f, x0, x1, w0) } }
w0.is_positive
(forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or not continuous_condition(f, x0, x1, w0) } = true)
(forall(x1: Real) { not (x1.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x0, x1, w0)) })
(forall(x1: Real) { not continuous_condition(f, x0, x1, w0) or not x1.is_positive })
function(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x0, k0, x1) } }(w0)
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x0, k0, w0) }
let w1: Real satisfy { w1.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x0, w1, w0) }
w1.is_positive
continuous_condition(f, x0, w1, w0)
function(x1: Real) { not (x1.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x0, x1, w0)) }(w1)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { not (x1.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x0, x1, k0)) } }

p.c: not forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x0, k0, x1) } }
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or not continuous_condition(f, x0, x1, k0) } }

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x0, k0, bad_eps) }

p.c: function(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x0, k0, x1) } }(bad_eps)
bad_eps.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or not continuous_condition(f, x0, x1, bad_eps) }
bad_eps.is_positive
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x0, k0, bad_eps) }
let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x0, w0, bad_eps) }
bad_eps.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or not continuous_condition(f, x0, x1, bad_eps) }
w0.is_positive
continuous_condition(f, x0, w0, bad_eps)
(forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or not continuous_condition(f, x0, x1, bad_eps) } = true)
(forall(x1: Real) { not (x1.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x0, x1, bad_eps)) })
function(x1: Real) { not (x1.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x0, x1, bad_eps)) }(w0)
continuous_at(f, x0) or false = true
continuous_at(f, x0)
function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(x1, x2, k0) } = differentiable_at(x1, x2) }(f, x0)
